# Teamz Lab Tools — Complete Tool Index

> 1588+ free browser-based tools and calculators at tool.teamzlab.com.
> All tools run 100% client-side. No data collection, no login, no server processing.
> Works on all devices. Inputs auto-save locally across sessions.

- Website: https://tool.teamzlab.com
- Total Tools: 1588+
- Categories: 90
- Sitemap: https://tool.teamzlab.com/sitemap.xml

## 3D Tools (10 tools)
- [3D Audio Visualizer Online](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/audio-visualizer/): Visualize your music in stunning 3D. Upload any audio file and watch real-time 3D visuals react to the beat — free, private, no signup required.
- [3D Dice Roller Online](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/dice-roller/): Roll realistic 3D dice with physics simulation. Free virtual dice roller for D&D, board games — supports d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20.
- [3D Model Viewer Online Free](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/model-viewer/): View 3D models instantly in your browser. Upload GLB, OBJ, FBX, STL files — rotate, zoom, inspect. Free, private, no signup required.
- [3D Model Viewer — STL, OBJ, GLTF](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/stl-viewer/): View STL, OBJ, GLTF, and GLB 3D models in your browser for free. Rotate, zoom, take screenshots — completely private, your file never leaves your device.
- [3D Print Time Estimator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/print-time-estimator/): Estimate 3D print duration from model dimensions and slicer settings. Compare layer heights and see filament usage. Free, private — runs in your browser.
- [3D Printing Cost Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/printing-cost-calculator/): Calculate 3D printing cost including material, electricity, depreciation, and labor. Estimate price with markup. Free and private.
- [3D Product Mockup Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/product-mockup-generator/): Generate 3D product box mockups instantly. Upload your label, customize dimensions, rotate in 3D, and download as PNG. Free, no login.
- [3D Text Generator — Free Online](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/text-generator/): Generate stunning 3D text online for free. Customize colors, depth, and materials. Rotate, zoom, and download as PNG. Private and browser-based.
- [STL to OBJ Converter — Free Online](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/stl-to-obj-converter/): Convert STL to OBJ and OBJ to STL instantly in your browser. Free, private 3D file converter with live preview. Files never leave your device.
- [WebGL Fluid Simulation](https://tool.teamzlab.com/3d/fluid-simulation/): Play with mesmerizing fluid dynamics in your browser. Free interactive WebGL simulation — touch, drag, and create colorful patterns privately.

## AI Tools (23 tools)
- [AI Agent ROI Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/ai-agent-roi-calculator/): Calculate your AI agent return on investment free. Compare human vs AI costs, estimate savings, and find your breakeven point. Private, no signup.

- [AI Headline Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/headline-generator/): Generate click-worthy headlines with browser-based AI. Get 10 variations with character counts and emotional scores. Free, private — runs on your device.
- [AI Prompt Cleaner](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/prompt-cleaner/): Clean and optimize AI prompts with readability scores, vague word detection, structure analysis, and improvement suggestions. Free, private, browser-based.
- [AI Quote Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/ai-quote-generator/): Generate beautiful quotes with AI or browse 500+ curated quotes. Customize backgrounds, fonts, and colors. Download as image or share. Free and private.
- [AI Resume Summary Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/resume-summary-generator/): Generate a professional resume summary using browser-based AI. Paste your experience and get a polished 2-3 sentence summary. Free, private — no data sent.
- [AI Text Humanizer Free](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/ai-text-humanizer/): Humanize AI-generated text instantly in your browser. Rewrite robotic AI content into natural human-sounding text. Free, private, no signup needed.
- [AI Text Summarizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/article-summarizer/): Summarize any text free with AI running in your browser. Choose key points, TL;DR, teaser, or headline output styles. 100% private — nothing ever uploaded.
- [Email Improver](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/email-improver/): Improve your email drafts with Chrome's built-in AI. Get better clarity, tone, and structure. 100% private — your email never leaves your browser.
- [Grammar Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/grammar-checker/): Check grammar, spelling, and punctuation with browser-based AI. Rule-based fallback catches 30+ common errors. Free, private — nothing leaves your device.
- [Interview Question Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/interview-question-generator/): Generate tailored interview questions with browser-based AI. Choose role, level, and focus area to get 10 relevant questions with answer tips. Free tool.
- [Job Description Extractor](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/job-description-extractor/): Extract skills, experience level, salary range, and location from job descriptions using Chrome's built-in AI. 100% private — nothing leaves your browser.
- [Language Detector](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/language-detector/): Detect the language of any text with confidence scores using Chrome's built-in Language Detector API. 100% private — your text never leaves your browser.
- [Meeting Notes Summarizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/meeting-notes-summarizer/): Summarize meeting notes and extract action items using browser-based AI. Get key points, decisions, and next steps instantly. Free, private, no data sent.
- [Payslip Explainer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/payslip-explainer/): Understand your payslip with browser-based AI. Get plain-English explanations of every deduction — tax, NI, pension, student loan, and more. 100% private.
- [Plain English Rewriter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/plain-english-rewriter/): Rewrite complex, legal, or technical text in plain English using browser-based AI. Get readability scores and simplification tips. Free, 100% private.
- [Private Contract Summarizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/contract-summarizer/): Summarize contracts and legal documents privately using browser-based AI. Extract key terms, deadlines, and obligations. Free — nothing ever uploaded.
- [Proposal Rewriter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/proposal-rewriter/): Rewrite freelance proposals more professionally using browser-based AI. Improve tone, clarity, and persuasiveness instantly. 100% private — free tool.
- [Synonym Finder](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/synonym-finder/): Find synonyms for any word using Chrome's built-in AI. Get contextual word alternatives instantly. 100% private — nothing leaves your browser.
- [Text to Checklist](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/text-to-checklist/): Convert paragraph text into a bulleted checklist using browser-based AI. Extract actionable items from any text. 100% private — no data leaves your device.
- [Tone Switcher](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/tone-switcher/): Switch text between formal, casual, and friendly tones using Chrome's built-in AI. Your text never leaves your browser. Free, private tone conversion tool.

## Accessibility (11 tools)
- [ADA Compliance Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/ada-compliance-checker/): Scan HTML for ADA accessibility issues instantly. Detect missing alt text, heading errors, ARIA problems, and more. Free, private, client-side.
- [Accessible Color Palette](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/accessible-color-palette-generator/): Generate WCAG-compliant color palettes from any brand color. See contrast ratios for every combination and check AA/AAA pass rates instantly.
- [Autism Support Plan Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/autism-support-plan-generator/): Create a free autism support plan for school, work, or medical visits. Share communication needs, sensory preferences, and meltdown protocols. Private.
- [Color Blindness Simulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/color-blindness-simulator/): Upload an image and see how it looks under protanopia, deuteranopia, tritanopia, and achromatopsia. Test your designs for color accessibility.
- [Dyslexia-Friendly Text Converter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/dyslexia-friendly-text-converter/): Convert any text to dyslexia-friendly formatting with OpenDyslexic font, wider spacing, reading ruler, and syllable highlights. Free and private.
- [IEP Goals Generator for Autism & ADHD](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/iep-goals-generator/): Generate free IEP goals for autism, ADHD, and special needs students. SMART goals with benchmarks and accommodations. 100% private.
- [SSDI Benefits Estimator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/ssdi-benefits-estimator/): Estimate your Social Security disability benefits using 2026 SSA bend points and AIME formulas. Calculate monthly and annual SSDI amounts privately.
- [Screen Reader Text Preview](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/screen-reader-text-preview/): Preview how screen readers announce your HTML. Detect missing alt text, empty links, and unlabeled form inputs. Free, private, runs in your browser.
- [Spoon Theory Energy Planner](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/spoon-theory-energy-planner/): Plan your day with limited energy using spoon theory. Assign spoon costs to activities, track remaining energy, and avoid burnout. Free and private.
- [Visual Schedule Maker for Autism](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/visual-schedule-maker/): Create free visual daily schedules for autism and ADHD. Drag-and-drop activities, emoji icons, print or download. 100% private.
- [WCAG Accessibility Checklist](https://tool.teamzlab.com/accessibility/wcag-accessibility-checklist/): Interactive WCAG 2.1 Level AA compliance checklist. Check off criteria, track your score, and export a PDF audit report. Free and private.

## Amazon Seller (20 tools)
- [A+ Content Image Size Guide](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/a-plus-content-image-guide/): Find every Amazon A+ Content module image size instantly. Check your images against required dimensions with the built-in size checker. Free and private.
- [Amazon ACoS & ROAS Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/acos-calculator/): Calculate Amazon ACoS, ROAS, TACoS, break-even ACoS, and CPC instantly. Optimize your PPC campaigns with this free, private advertising metrics tool.
- [Amazon BSR Sales Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/bsr-sales-calculator/): Convert Amazon BSR to estimated daily and monthly sales. Free calculator with 22 categories, revenue projections, confidence bands, and reverse BSR lookup.
- [Amazon Competitor Analysis Tool](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/competitor-analysis-tool/): Analyze up to 5 Amazon competitors side by side. Compare price, BSR, reviews, ratings, and listing quality to find market gaps. Free and private.
- [Amazon Coupon Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/coupon-calculator/): Calculate the true cost of Amazon coupons and promotions including clip fees, redemption rates, and break-even sales lift. Free, private, no sign-up.
- [Amazon Dimensional Weight Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/dimensional-weight-calculator/): Calculate Amazon FBA dimensional weight, billable weight, and size tier instantly. Find your fulfillment fee and optimize packaging. Free and private.
- [Amazon FBA Fee Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/fba-fee-calculator/): Calculate Amazon FBA fees including referral, fulfillment, and storage costs. Estimate net profit and margin for any product. Free and private.
- [Amazon FBA Storage Fee Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/storage-fee-calculator/): Calculate Amazon FBA monthly and long-term storage fees with aged inventory surcharges. Estimate annual costs by season. Free, private, browser-based.
- [Amazon Keyword Research Tool](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/keyword-research-tool/): Generate hundreds of Amazon keyword ideas from a seed keyword. Expand with alphabet, question, modifier, and commercial intent patterns. Free and private.
- [Amazon Listing Character Counter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/listing-character-counter/): Count characters and bytes for all Amazon listing fields. Check title, bullets, description, and backend search terms against limits. Free and private.
- [Amazon Listing Template Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/listing-template-generator/): Generate structured Amazon listing templates by category with optimized titles, bullet points, descriptions, and search terms. Free and private.
- [Amazon PPC Bid Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/ppc-bid-calculator/): Calculate optimal Amazon PPC bid amounts, break-even CPC, and cost per acquisition. Compare bid strategies to maximize ad profit privately and free.
- [Amazon Product Description Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/product-description-generator/): Generate optimized Amazon product titles, bullet points, descriptions, and backend search terms instantly. Free, private, no sign-up required.
- [Amazon Product Research Scorecard](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/product-research-scorecard/): Score any Amazon product opportunity out of 100 based on demand, competition, profitability, and improvement potential. Free and private.
- [Amazon Profit Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/profit-calculator/): Calculate Amazon seller profit margins, FBA fees, referral fees, and net profit per unit instantly. Free, private, no sign-up required.
- [Amazon ROI Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/fba-roi-calculator/): Calculate return on investment for Amazon FBA products including payback period, break-even units, and 12-month projections. Free and private.
- [Amazon Referral Fee Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/referral-fee-calculator/): Calculate Amazon referral fees by product category. Look up tiered rates, minimum fees, and net revenue for any selling price. Free and private.
- [Amazon Restock Planner](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/restock-planner/): Plan optimal Amazon FBA inventory restock timing and quantities. Avoid stockouts, calculate reorder points, and project 90-day inventory levels free.
- [Amazon Sales Estimator by BSR](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/sales-estimator/): Estimate monthly Amazon sales from Best Seller Rank. Free BSR-to-sales calculator with 22 categories, revenue projections, and confidence bands.
- [Amazon Seller Fee Breakdown](https://tool.teamzlab.com/amazon/seller-fee-breakdown/): Visualize all Amazon seller fees with interactive charts. See referral, FBA, storage, and closing fees as a percentage of selling price. Free and private.

- [Screen Time Analyzer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apple/screen-time-analyzer/): Calculate how much time you spend on your phone daily, weekly, and yearly. See what you could accomplish with that time and get personalized usage tips.
- [iCloud Storage Planner](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apple/icloud-storage-planner/): Find which iCloud storage plan you actually need. Calculate total usage across devices, photos, backups, and iCloud Drive to pick the right plan and price.

- [EV Range Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/ev-range-calculator/): Estimate your electric car's real-world range based on battery capacity, charge level, temperature, and driving conditions. Free, private, browser-based.
- [EV vs Petrol Cost Comparison Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/ev-vs-petrol-cost/): Compare the annual running costs of an electric car vs a petrol car. See yearly fuel costs, monthly savings, 5-year savings, and CO2 emissions reduction.
- [Fuel Cost Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/fuel-cost-calculator/): Calculate exactly how much fuel your trip will cost. Enter distance, fuel efficiency, and gas price to get total fuel needed and trip cost. Free, private.
- [MPG to L/100km Converter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/mpg-to-l100km-converter/): Convert between MPG (US), MPG (UK), L/100km, and km/L instantly. See all four fuel efficiency units at once with efficiency ratings. Free, browser-based.
- [Mileage Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/mileage-calculator/): Calculate trip fuel cost and fuel efficiency. Enter distance, gas price, and MPG to get total cost instantly. Free online mileage calculator.
- [Road Trip Cost Planner](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/road-trip-cost-planner/): Plan your road trip budget with this all-in-one cost calculator. Estimate fuel, tolls, parking, food, and hotel costs for a complete per-person breakdown.
- [Tire Pressure Guide](https://tool.teamzlab.com/auto/tire-pressure-checker/): Find recommended tire pressure for your vehicle. Get PSI for sedans, SUVs, trucks, sports cars, and EVs adjusted for load, weather, and tire type. Free.

- [Resume Action Verb Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/career/action-verb-checker/): Analyze your resume for strong action verbs and weak phrases. Get a strength score, replacement suggestions, and verb variety rating. Free, browser-based.

- [Resume Keyword Scanner](https://tool.teamzlab.com/career/resume-keyword-scanner/): Scan your resume for specific target keywords. See which are found, which are missing, get frequency counts, and optimize for job applications. Free tool.
- [Resume vs Job Description Matcher](https://tool.teamzlab.com/career/resume-job-match-checker/): Compare your resume against a job description for an overall match percentage. See category breakdowns for skills, experience, education, and gap analysis.
- [Simple Resume Builder](https://tool.teamzlab.com/career/simple-resume-builder/): Build a professional resume in minutes. Fill in your details, choose a template, and download as PDF. No signup, no watermark, 100% free and private.

- [EU AI Act Literacy Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/compliance/eu-ai-act-literacy-checker/): Check if your organization needs AI literacy training under the EU AI Act. Find out your obligations for staff training on artificial intelligence systems.
- [EU Pay Transparency Directive Checker — Teamz Lab Tools](https://tool.teamzlab.com/compliance/eu-pay-transparency-checker/): Check if the EU Pay Transparency Directive applies to your organization. Find out your obligations for salary disclosure and pay gap reporting.
- [GDPR Penalty Estimator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/compliance/gdpr-penalty-estimator/): Estimate the potential GDPR fine for a data protection violation. Enter annual revenue, violation type, and mitigating factors. Free, private calculator.
- [Privacy Policy Readability Analyzer — Teamz Lab Tools](https://tool.teamzlab.com/compliance/privacy-policy-readability/): Analyze your privacy policy readability. Get Flesch reading ease score, grade level, word count, and estimated reading time. Free, private, browser-based.
- [ViDA Timeline Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/compliance/vida-timeline-checker/): Check which ViDA (VAT in the Digital Age) requirements apply to your business and when. See timelines for e-invoicing and digital reporting obligations.

- [Sponsorship Rate Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/creator/sponsorship-rate-calculator/): Calculate fair sponsorship rates for content creators based on platform, followers, engagement rate, content type, and usage rights. Free pricing tool.

- [Keyboard Polling Rate Test](https://tool.teamzlab.com/gaming/keyboard-polling-rate-test/): Test your keyboard polling rate online for free. Measure how fast your keyboard reports keypresses in Hz with real-time results. Private.

- [Monitor Refresh Rate Test](https://tool.teamzlab.com/gaming/monitor-refresh-rate-test/): Test your monitor refresh rate visually online. See moving objects at different speeds to verify your display Hz. Detect frame skipping. Free and private.
- [Mouse Sensitivity Converter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/gaming/mouse-sensitivity-converter/): Convert mouse sensitivity between games instantly. Support for Valorant, CS2, Apex, Fortnite, and 15+ games. Calculate cm/360 and eDPI. Free and private.

- [Time Blindness Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/health/time-blindness-calculator/): ADHD brains underestimate time. Enter your tasks and get realistic estimates with buffers for transitions, startup, and distractions. Free and private.
- [Time Blocking Planner — Daily Schedule](https://tool.teamzlab.com/health/time-blocking-planner/): Plan your day with free time blocking. Create visual daily schedules with draggable blocks. Saves locally, exports as text. 100% private.
- [Toxic Relationship Quiz](https://tool.teamzlab.com/health/toxic-relationship-quiz/): Check for red flags in your relationship with this free 15-question toxic relationship quiz. Identify unhealthy patterns privately with instant results.
- [Visual Acuity Test — Eye Chart Online](https://tool.teamzlab.com/health/visual-acuity-test/): Test your visual acuity with a free digital Snellen eye chart. Calibrate your screen, test each eye, and get approximate results. 100% private.

- [App Store & Play Store Screenshot Sizes](https://tool.teamzlab.com/mobile/app-store-screenshot-sizes/): Complete guide to App Store and Play Store screenshot sizes for 2026. All required dimensions for iPhone, iPad, Android phones, and tablets. Free.
- [App Version Code Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/mobile/app-version-code-calculator/): Convert between semantic versioning (1.2.3) and Android versionCode integers. Calculate version codes for Google Play and plan increments. Free.
- [Deep Link Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/mobile/deep-link-generator/): Generate deep links for iOS Universal Links and Android App Links. Build and validate deep link URLs with parameters for your mobile app. Free.
- [Material Design Color Palette Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/mobile/material-design-color-palette/): Generate Material Design 3 color palettes from any seed color. Get primary, secondary, tertiary tones with Dart, Kotlin, and XML code. Free.
- [Mobile Screen Sizes Database](https://tool.teamzlab.com/mobile/mobile-screen-sizes/): Complete database of mobile screen sizes, resolutions, and pixel densities for iPhone, Samsung, Pixel, and popular devices. Search or filter. Free.
- [Push Notification Payload Builder](https://tool.teamzlab.com/mobile/push-notification-payload-builder/): Build FCM and APNs push notification payloads visually. Generate JSON for Firebase Cloud Messaging and Apple Push Notifications. Free and private.
- [iOS & Android App Permissions Reference](https://tool.teamzlab.com/mobile/ios-android-permissions/): Complete searchable reference for iOS and Android app permissions. Find permission names, descriptions, usage strings, and code snippets. Free tool.

## Music & Audio (8 tools)
- [BPM Tap Tempo](https://tool.teamzlab.com/music/bpm-tapper/): Tap any key or click to instantly detect BPM. Real-time beat-per-minute counter with confidence meter and visual beat flash. Free online tap tempo tool.
- [BPM to Milliseconds Converter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/music/bpm-to-ms-converter/): Convert BPM to milliseconds for every note duration. Calculate delay times, reverb pre-delay, and sync settings for music production. Free tool.
- [Key Signature Finder](https://tool.teamzlab.com/music/key-signature-finder/): Find the musical key of any song by entering its notes or chords. Shows likely key, confidence score, scale notes, and compatible chords. Free tool.
- [Music Practice Timer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/music/practice-timer/): Plan and time structured music practice sessions with automatic section changes, audio bells, and visual progress. Includes warm-up and breaks. Free.
- [Musical Interval Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/music/interval-calculator/): Calculate the musical interval between any two notes. Shows interval name, semitone distance, frequency ratio, and consonance rating. Free tool.
- [Musical Note Frequency Chart](https://tool.teamzlab.com/music/note-frequency-chart/): Complete frequency chart for all musical notes C0 to B8 in equal temperament. See Hz values, MIDI numbers, and play any note. A440 reference. Free.
- [Random Chord Progression Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/music/chord-progression-generator/): Generate chord progressions in any key and style. Get pop, rock, jazz, sad, or happy progressions with Roman numerals and audio playback. Free tool.
- [Time Signature Guide](https://tool.teamzlab.com/music/time-signature-explainer/): Learn and hear time signatures with interactive audio. Play 2/4, 3/4, 4/4, 6/8, and more with accent visualization and song examples. Free guide.

- [Heart Rate Zone Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/sports/heart-rate-zone-calculator/): Calculate your heart rate training zones using Max HR or Karvonen method. Find zones for fat burn, aerobic, and VO2max training. Free calculator.
- [Ideal Weight Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/sports/ideal-weight-calculator/): Calculate your ideal weight using Devine, Robinson, Miller, and Hamwi formulas. Adjusts for body frame size with BMI-based range. Free calculator.
- [Marathon Wall Predictor](https://tool.teamzlab.com/sports/marathon-wall-predictor/): Predict if and when you will hit the wall during a marathon. Analyzes glycogen stores, pace, weight, and carb loading for risk estimate. Free.
- [One Rep Max Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/sports/one-rep-max-calculator/): Calculate your one rep max free using 7 proven formulas. Estimate 1RM for bench press, squat, deadlift — private, no signup required.
- [Race Time Predictor](https://tool.teamzlab.com/sports/race-finish-time-predictor/): Predict your race finish times for 5K, 10K, half marathon, and marathon using the Riegel formula. Enter a known race result for predictions. Free.
- [Running Pace Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/sports/pace-calculator/): Calculate running pace calculator to find pace per km or mile, speed in km/h or mph, and predict finish times for 5K, 10K, half marathon, and marathon.
- [Split Time Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/sports/split-time-calculator/): Calculate even split times for any race distance. Get a detailed split table with cumulative time and pace for 5K, 10K, half marathon, and more. Free.
- [VO2 Max Estimator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/sports/vo2max-estimator/): Estimate your VO2 max using Cooper Test, 1.5 Mile Run, or Rockport Walk Test. Get fitness rating by age and gender with percentile. Free tool.

- [Open Graph Previewer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/open-graph-previewer/): Preview how your URL will look when shared on Facebook, Twitter, and LinkedIn. Enter og:title, og:description, and og:image for a live mockup.
- [Paragraph Counter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/paragraph-counter/): Count paragraphs, words, and sentences in your text with real-time analysis. Free online paragraph counter for writers, students, and editors.
- [Passive Voice Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/passive-voice-checker/): Detect passive voice sentences in your text. Highlights passive constructions, shows percentage, and helps you write in active voice. Free tool.
- [Readability Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/readability-checker/): Check your text readability with Flesch Reading Ease and Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level scores. Get word count, sentence stats, and difficulty rating.
- [Remove Duplicate Lines](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/remove-duplicate-lines/): Use this free tool to remove duplicate lines from text. Filter out repeated lines with case sensitivity control, whitespace trimming, and optional sorting.
- [Remove Extra Spaces](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/remove-extra-spaces/): Use this free tool to remove extra spaces from text. Collapse multiple spaces into one, trim lines, and remove blank lines for clean output. Private.
- [Remove Line Breaks](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/remove-line-breaks/): Use this free tool to remove line breaks from text. Replace newlines with spaces, commas, or nothing to merge multi-line text into one string.

- [Sentence Counter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/sentence-counter/): Count sentences, paragraphs, words, and characters in your text. Get average sentence length and reading statistics. Free online sentence counter.
- [Syllable Counter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/syllable-counter/): Count syllables in your text with a per-word breakdown. Useful for poetry, haiku, readability analysis, and language learning. Free online tool.
- [Text Diff Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/diff-checker/): Check text diff checker. Compare two texts side by side and instantly see added, removed, and unchanged lines with color-coded highlighting.
- [Text Line Sorter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/text-sorter/): Use this free text line sorter. Sort lines alphabetically, numerically, or by length in ascending or descending order with case sensitivity options.
- [Twitter/X Character Counter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/twitter-character-counter/): Count tweet characters against the 280-character Twitter/X limit. URLs count as 23 chars each. See remaining characters, words, and URLs detected.
- [Word Counter Online Free](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/word-counter/): Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs instantly. Free word counter with reading time estimate for essays, blog posts, and social media.
- [Word Frequency Counter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/text/word-frequency-counter/): Use this free word frequency counter. Analyze your text to find the most common words with frequency counts, percentages, and ranked tables. Private.

## Physics (10 tools)
- [Acceleration Calculator — Teamz Lab Tools](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/acceleration-calculator/): Calculate acceleration using five physics formulas: linear, force-based, centripetal, gravitational, and angular. Free, private, step-by-step solutions.
- [Force Calculator (F=ma & More)](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/force-calculator/): Calculate force using Newton's second law, gravity, weight, centripetal, and spring formulas. Step-by-step working, free and private.
- [Half-Life Calculator — Teamz Lab Tools](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/half-life-calculator/): Calculate radioactive decay, remaining quantity, elapsed time, decay constant, and drug half-life. Free, private, works offline.
- [Kinetic Energy Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/kinetic-energy-calculator/): Calculate kinetic energy, mass, or velocity using KE=½mv². Includes relativistic and work-energy modes with step-by-step working. Free and private.
- [Momentum Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/momentum-calculator/): Calculate linear momentum, solve elastic and inelastic collisions, and find impulse with step-by-step solutions. Free private physics calculator.
- [Physics Formula Sheet](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/physics-formula-sheet/): Browse 30+ essential physics formulas across mechanics, waves, electricity, optics, and thermodynamics. Search, filter, and copy any formula instantly.
- [Potential Energy Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/potential-energy-calculator/): Calculate gravitational and elastic potential energy with step-by-step solutions. Supports PE=mgh and PE=½kx² formulas. Free private physics calculator.
- [Projectile Motion Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/projectile-motion-calculator/): Calculate projectile range, max height, time of flight, and impact velocity with trajectory graph. Free private physics calculator — runs in your browser.
- [Resistance Calculator — Teamz Lab Tools](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/resistance-calculator/): Calculate electrical resistance using Ohm's Law, series, parallel, resistor color codes, and power dissipation. Free, private, runs in your browser.
- [Velocity Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/physics/velocity-calculator/): Calculate average, final, initial, angular, and escape velocity with step-by-step solutions. Free private physics calculator — runs in your browser.

## Japan (8 tools)
- [ふるさと納税控除額計算](https://tool.teamzlab.com/jp/furusato-nozei-keisan/): 年収からふるさと納税の控除上限額を計算。自己負担2,000円で寄附できる目安がわかります。家族構成にも対応した無料シミュレーション。. Free online tool, 100% private.
- [フリーランス時給計算](https://tool.teamzlab.com/jp/freelance-jikyu-keisan/): フリーランスの最低時給を計算。経費・税金・稼働時間から適正な単価がわかります。日給や年間売上目標も自動算出する無料ツール。. Free online tool, 100% private.
- [住宅ローン計算](https://tool.teamzlab.com/jp/juutaku-loan-keisan/): 住宅ローンの月々の返済額を計算。元利均等返済で総返済額と利息総額がわかります。借入額・金利・期間を入力するだけの無料シミュレーション。. Free online tool, 100% private.
- [年収手取り計算](https://tool.teamzlab.com/jp/nenshu-tedori/): 年収から年間の手取り額を概算。社会保険料と税金を差し引いた実際の手取りがわかります。年収別の手取り早見表も掲載。. Free online tool, 100% private.
- [手取り計算ツール](https://tool.teamzlab.com/jp/tedori-keisan/): 額面給与から手取り額を計算。社会保険料・所得税・住民税を差し引いた実際の受取額がわかります。無料の手取りシミュレーションツールです。. Free online tool, 100% private.
- [消費税計算ツール](https://tool.teamzlab.com/jp/shouhizei-keisan/): 税込み・税抜き価格を計算。10%と8%（軽減税率）に対応。内税・外税の変換ができます。消費税額を瞬時に算出する無料ツール。. Free online tool, 100% private.
- [通勤費計算ツール](https://tool.teamzlab.com/jp/tsuukin-hi-keisan/): 電車・バス・車通勤の月額・年額通勤費を計算。非課税限度額の目安もわかります。通勤手段の比較や交通費の把握に便利な無料ツール。. Free online tool, 100% private.
- [電気代計算ツール](https://tool.teamzlab.com/jp/denki-dai-keisan/): 家電製品の1日・1ヶ月・1年間の電気代を計算。消費電力と使用時間から電気料金がわかります。節電の参考にお使いください。. Free online tool, 100% private.

- [Malaysia e-Invoice Start Date Checker — Teamz Lab Tools](https://tool.teamzlab.com/my/e-invoice-start-date-checker/): Check when your Malaysian business must start issuing e-Invoices under LHDN's mandate. Enter revenue and business type to find your deadline. Free.
- [MyInvois Readiness Checker Malaysia — Teamz Lab Tools](https://tool.teamzlab.com/my/myinvois-readiness-checker/): Assess your business readiness for Malaysia's MyInvois e-Invoice system. Score preparation across TIN, certificates, and software. Free tool.

## Netherlands (12 tools)
- [30% Ruling Calculator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/30-ruling-calculator/): Calculate your 30% ruling tax savings in the Netherlands for 2026. Free expat salary calculator with monthly breakdown and 2027 comparison.
- [Box 3 Belasting Berekenen 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/box-3-belasting-berekenen/): Bereken uw box 3 belasting 2026. Gratis calculator met forfaitair rendement, heffingsvrijvermogen en fiscaal partnerschap. Privacyvriendelijk.
- [Huurtoeslag Berekenen 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/huurtoeslag-berekenen/): Bereken gratis uw huurtoeslag 2026. Nieuwe regels: geen huurgrens meer, leeftijdsgrens nu 21 jaar. Vergelijk met 2025 en ontdek uw maandelijkse toeslag.
- [Huurverhoging Checker 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/huurverhoging-checker/): Controleer of uw huurverhoging in 2026 wettelijk is toegestaan. Bereken het maximale percentage voor sociale huur, vrije sector en middenhuur.
- [Hypotheek Berekenen 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/hypotheek-berekenen/): Bereken uw maximale hypotheek en maandlasten 2026. Gratis calculator met NHG-grens, studieschuld en actuele rente. Privacyvriendelijk, geen data opgeslagen.
- [Kindgebonden Budget Berekenen 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/kindgebonden-budget-berekenen/): Bereken uw kindgebonden budget 2026. Gratis calculator met actuele bedragen per leeftijd, inkomenstoets en alleenstaande ouderkop. Privacyvriendelijk.
- [Netto Salaris Berekenen 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/netto-salaris-berekenen/): Bereken gratis uw netto salaris 2026. Inclusief loonbelasting, arbeidskorting, algemene heffingskorting en maandelijkse breakdown per belastingschijf.
- [Overdrachtsbelasting Berekenen 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/overdrachtsbelasting-berekenen/): Bereken de overdrachtsbelasting bij het kopen van een woning in 2026. Gratis tool met startersvrijstelling, eigen bewoning en belegging tarieven.
- [Schijnzelfstandigheid Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/schijnzelfstandigheid-checker/): Gratis schijnzelfstandigheid checker voor ZZP'ers. Controleer uw risico op basis van de Wet DBA en Wet VBAR criteria. Resultaat direct beschikbaar.
- [WOZ Waarde Impact Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/woz-waarde-impact/): Bereken de impact van uw WOZ-waarde op gemeentebelasting 2026. Gratis calculator voor OZB, rioolheffing en afvalstoffenheffing. Privacyvriendelijk.
- [Zelfstandigenaftrek Berekenen 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/zelfstandigenaftrek-berekenen/): Bereken uw zelfstandigenaftrek, startersaftrek en MKB-winstvrijstelling in 2026. Gratis tool voor zzp'ers en ondernemers. Privé en direct resultaat.
- [Zorgtoeslag Berekenen 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nl/zorgtoeslag-berekenen/): Bereken hoeveel zorgtoeslag u krijgt in 2026. Gratis, privé en direct resultaat op basis van uw inkomen en huishouden.

## Norway (12 tools)
- [Bostøtte Forhåndskalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/bostotte-forhandskalkulator/): Sjekk om du kan ha rett på bostøtte fra Husbanken. Beregn mulig støtte basert på inntekt og boutgifter med vår gratis kalkulator.
- [Dagslys Kalkulator Norge](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/dagslys-kalkulator/): Beregn soloppgang, solnedgang og dagslyslengde for norske byer. Se midnattssol og mørketid for Tromsø, Oslo og flere.
- [Elbil Ladekost Kalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/elbil-ladekost-kalkulator/): Beregn ladekostnader for elbil i Norge. Sammenlign hjemmelading vs offentlig lading, se årlig besparelse og ladetid.
- [Foreldrepenger Planlegger](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/foreldrepenger-planlegger/): Beregn foreldrepengene dine basert på inntekt. Planlegg uttak og se månedlig utbetaling med vår gratis kalkulator for norske foreldre.
- [Freelance Priskalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/freelance-priskalkulator/): Beregn minste timepris som frilanser i Norge. Se hva du må ta betalt for å dekke kostnader, skatt og ønsket overskudd.
- [Husleie vs Inntekt Kalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/husleie-vs-inntekt-kalkulator/): Hvor stor del av inntekten din går til husleie? Sjekk om husleien er bærekraftig med vår gratis kalkulator for norske leietakere.
- [Lønn Etter Skatt Kalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/lonn-etter-skatt-kalkulator/): Beregn netto lønn etter skatt i Norge. Se trinnskatt, trygdeavgift, personfradrag og minstefradrag med 2026-satser.
- [Norgespris Strømkalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/norgespris-stromkalkulator/): Beregn strømkostnader med Norgespris eller spotpris. Sammenlign prissoner NO1-NO5, se nettleie, elavgift og MVA-beregning.
- [Omsorgspenger Kalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/omsorgspenger-kalkulator/): Beregn omsorgspenger for sykt barn-dager. Se hvor mye du får utbetalt per dag og hva du har igjen av omsorgsdager i år med vår kalkulator.
- [Pendlerfradrag Kalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/pendlerfradrag-kalkulator/): Beregn pendlerfradrag for reise mellom hjem og arbeid. Se skattebesparelse basert på avstand, arbeidsdager og reisemiddel.
- [Strømstøtte Kalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/stromstotte-kalkulator/): Beregn strømstøtte fra staten basert på strømpris og forbruk. Se hvor mye du kan få i støtte når strømprisene er høye.
- [Studentbudsjett Kalkulator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/no/studentbudsjett-kalkulator/): Planlegg studentbudsjettet ditt med Lånekassen-støtte, husleie og utgifter. Se om pengene strekker til med vår kalkulator.

- [CSN Återbetalning Planerare](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/csn-aterbetalning-planerare/): Planera din CSN-återbetalning. Beräkna månadskostnad och total ränta baserat på skuld och ränta med vår gratiskalkylator.
- [Elkostnad Kalkylator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/elkostnad-kalkylator/): Beräkna din elkostnad per månad baserat på elområde, förbrukning, elnätsavgift och energiskatt. Gratis kalkylator för svenska hushåll.
- [Freelancer Prissättning Kalkylator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/freelancer-prissattning-kalkylator/): Beräkna din lägsta timpris som frilansare i Sverige. Se vad du måste ta betalt för att täcka kostnader, skatt och önskat överskott.
- [Föräldrapenning Planerare](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/foraldrapenning-planerare/): Planera din föräldrapenning — beräkna ersättning per dag och månad baserat på din SGI. Gratis kalkylator för svenska föräldrar.
- [Hyra vs Inkomst Kalkylator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/hyra-vs-inkomst-kalkylator/): Hur stor del av din inkomst går till hyra? Beräkna din hyresbelastning och se om den är hållbar med vår gratiskalkylator.
- [ISK Skatt Kalkylator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/isk-skatt-kalkylator/): Beräkna din ISK-skatt 2026 med nya fribelopps­gränsen på 300 000 kr. Jämför med 2025 och se hur mycket du sparar. Privat och gratis.
- [K4 Kryptoskatt Kalkylator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/k4-kryptoskatt-kalkylator/): Beräkna kapitalvinstskatt på krypto, aktier och fonder för K4-blanketten. Gratis skattekalkylator med 2026 regler och DAC8-info.
- [Levnadskostnad Kalkylator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/levnadskostnad-kalkylator/): Jämför levnadskostnader mellan svenska städer. Beräkna hyra, mat, transport och totala månadskostnader baserat på hushållsstorlek — gratis och privat.
- [Lönekalkylator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/lonekalkylator/): Beräkna din nettolön efter skatt i Sverige 2026. Välj kommun, se kommunalskatt, statlig skatt och kyrkoskatt direkt i webbläsaren.
- [Pensionskalkylator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/pensionskalkylator/): Beräkna din framtida pension med allmän pension och tjänstepension. Gratis svensk pensionskalkylator med aktuella tak och procentsatser för 2026.
- [RUT & ROT Avdrag Kalkylator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/rut-rot-avdrag-kalkylator/): Beräkna ditt RUT- eller ROT-avdrag för 2026. Se hur mycket du sparar på arbetskostnaden och vad du betalar efter skattereduktion. Helt gratis.
- [Reseavdrag Kalkylator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/reseavdrag-kalkylator/): Beräkna ditt reseavdrag för resor mellan hem och arbete. Se skatteåterbäring baserat på avstånd, arbetsdagar och färdmedel.
- [VAB Ersättning Kalkylator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/se/vab-ersattning-kalkylator/): Beräkna din VAB-ersättning (vård av sjukt barn). Se hur mycket du får per dag och vad du förlorar i lön med vår gratiskalkylator.

- [Miete vs Kaufen Rechner Schweiz](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ch/miete-vs-kaufen-rechner/): Vergleichen Sie Mieten und Kaufen in der Schweiz. Gesamtkosten über 10-30 Jahre. Kostenlos, privat, ohne Anmeldung.
- [Pendlerkosten Rechner Schweiz](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ch/pendlerkosten-rechner/): Berechnen Sie Ihre Pendlerkosten und steuerliche Abzüge. Auto vs ÖV Vergleich. Kostenlos, privat, ohne Anmeldung.
- [Quellensteuer Rechner Schweiz 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ch/quellensteuer-rechner/): Berechnen Sie Ihre Quellensteuer nach Kanton. Zürich, Bern, Basel und alle Kantone. Kostenlos, privat, ohne Anmeldung.
- [Stundensatz Rechner Schweiz](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ch/stundensatz-rechner/): Berechnen Sie Ihren Stundensatz als Freelancer in der Schweiz. Kosten, Steuern und Gewinn berücksichtigt. Kostenlos und privat.
- [Swiss AHV Pension Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ch/swiss-ahv-pension-calculator/): Calculate your Swiss AHV pension entitlement and projected monthly retirement income. Based on 2025 contribution rules. Free.

## Dk (8 tools)
- [Boliglån Beregner Danmark 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dk/boliglaan-beregner/): Beregn din boliglån ydelse i Danmark. Se rente, afdrag, månedlig betaling og amortiseringsplan. Gratis boliglån beregner uden login.
- [Ejendomsskat Beregner 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dk/ejendomsskat-beregner/): Beregn din ejendomsskat og grundskyld i Danmark. Ejendomsværdiskat og kommunal grundskyld med kommunevælger. Gratis beregner uden login.
- [Feriepenge Beregner 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dk/feriepenge-beregner/): Beregn dine feriepenge i Danmark for 2026. 12,5% af din ferieberettigede løn plus ferietillæg. Se feriedage og udbetaling. Gratis beregner.
- [Kørselsfradrag Beregner 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dk/koerselsfradrag-beregner/): Beregn dit kørselsfradrag i Danmark 2026. Afstand til arbejde, befordringsfradrag og skattebesparelse. Gratis, privat beregner uden login.
- [Løn efter Skat Beregner 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dk/loen-efter-skat/): Beregn din løn efter skat i Danmark 2026. Se nettoløn med AM-bidrag, kommuneskat, bundskat og pension. Gratis, privat beregner uden login.
- [Pension Beregner Danmark 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dk/pension-beregner/): Beregn din pension i Danmark. Folkepension, ATP og arbejdsmarkedspension. Se forventet pension ved pensionsalder. Gratis, privat beregner.
- [SU Beregner 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dk/su-beregner/): Beregn din SU (Statens Uddannelsesstøtte) i Danmark 2026. Udeboende og hjemmeboende satser, fribeløb og indkomstgrænser. Gratis beregner.
- [Skat Beregner 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dk/skat-beregner/): Beregn din skat i Danmark for 2026. AM-bidrag, kommuneskat, bundskat og topskat med kommunevælger. Gratis, privat beregner uden login.

## Es (11 tools)
- [Calculadora Ahorro Jubilación](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/calculadora-ahorro-jubilacion/): Proyecta tu fondo de jubilación con aportes mensuales y rendimiento estimado. Calcula cuánto necesitas ahorrar para tu retiro. Gratis y privada.
- [Calculadora Amortización Préstamo](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/calculadora-prestamo/): Calcula la cuota mensual, intereses totales y tabla de amortización de cualquier préstamo. Herramienta gratuita y privada para planificar tus deudas.
- [Calculadora Costo de Auto](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/calculadora-costo-auto/): Determina cuánto auto puedes pagar según tus ingresos y gastos. Calcula la cuota mensual y el precio máximo recomendado. Gratis y privada.
- [Calculadora Interés Compuesto](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/calculadora-interes-compuesto/): Calcula el interés compuesto de tu inversión con aportes periódicos. Gratis, privado y sin registro. Visualiza el crecimiento de tu capital.
- [Calculadora Margen de Beneficio](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/calculadora-margen-beneficio/): Calcula el margen de beneficio bruto y neto de tu negocio. Ingresa ingresos y costos para ver la rentabilidad. Herramienta gratuita y privada.
- [Calculadora Salario por Hora](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/calculadora-salario-por-hora/): Convierte tu salario por hora a anual y viceversa. Calcula con horas extras, días laborales y deducciones. Herramienta gratuita y privada.
- [Calculadora de Hipoteca](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/calculadora-hipoteca/): Calcula tu cuota mensual de hipoteca, total de intereses y tabla de amortización. Herramienta gratuita y privada para planificar tu vivienda.
- [Calculadora de IMC](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/calculadora-imc/): Calcula tu Índice de Masa Corporal con peso y altura. Obtén tu categoría de salud y rango de peso ideal. Gratis, privada y sin registro.
- [Calculadora de TAE](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/calculadora-tasa-apr/): Calcula la Tasa Anual Equivalente de tu préstamo incluyendo comisiones y gastos. Compara ofertas financieras de forma gratuita y privada.
- [Generador de Carta de Presentación — Teamz Lab](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/generador-carta-presentacion/): Genera una carta de presentación profesional al instante. Introduce tu nombre, puesto, habilidades y logro clave. Gratis, privado, sin registro.
- [Presupuesto 50/30/20](https://tool.teamzlab.com/es/presupuesto-50-30-20/): Divide tus ingresos con la regla 50/30/20: necesidades, deseos y ahorro. Calculadora gratuita y privada para organizar tu presupuesto mensual.

## Ie (8 tools)
- [Capital Gains Tax Calculator Ireland](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ie/capital-gains-tax-ireland/): Calculate CGT on property, shares and investments in Ireland. 33% rate with annual exemption. Free, private CGT calculator.
- [Inheritance Tax Calculator Ireland](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ie/inheritance-tax-calculator/): Calculate Capital Acquisitions Tax (CAT) on inheritance in Ireland. Group thresholds A, B, C and 33% rate. Free, private calculator.
- [Irish Salary Calculator 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ie/irish-salary-calculator/): Calculate your take-home pay in Ireland after Income Tax, USC, and PRSI. 2026 rates and bands. Free, private, no signup.
- [Mortgage Calculator Ireland 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ie/mortgage-calculator-ireland/): Calculate monthly mortgage repayments in Ireland. Interest rates, loan terms, and amortization schedule. Free, private, no signup needed.
- [Pension Tax Relief Ireland](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ie/pension-tax-relief-calculator/): Calculate pension tax relief in Ireland by age. See how much you save on income tax through pension contributions. Free calculator, no signup.
- [Rental Income Tax Calculator Ireland](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ie/rental-income-tax-calculator/): Calculate tax on rental income in Ireland. Allowable expenses, Income Tax, USC, and PRSI on rental profits. Free calculator, no signup.
- [Stamp Duty Calculator Ireland 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ie/stamp-duty-calculator/): Calculate stamp duty on property purchases in Ireland. 1% up to one million, 2% above. Residential and non-residential rates. Free calculator.
- [USC Calculator Ireland 2026](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ie/usc-calculator/): Calculate Universal Social Charge (USC) in Ireland for 2026. Current rates and bands. Free, private USC calculator, no signup required.

## Nz (1 tools)
- [KiwiSaver Calculator 2025](https://tool.teamzlab.com/nz/kiwisaver-calculator/): Calculate your projected KiwiSaver balance at retirement with employer contributions and government tax credits. Free, private, no sign-up needed.

## Pt (11 tools)
- [Calculadora Salário por Hora](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/calculadora-salario-hora/): Converta salário por hora em mensal e anual gratuitamente. Padrão CLT de 220 horas mensais. Calcule o valor da sua hora. Privado e sem cadastro.
- [Calculadora de Amortização](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/calculadora-emprestimo/): Compare sistemas SAC e Tabela Price gratuitamente. Veja parcelas, juros e saldo devedor mês a mês. Privado e sem cadastro.
- [Calculadora de Aposentadoria](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/calculadora-aposentadoria/): Projete sua aposentadoria gratuitamente. Poupança atual, aportes mensais e rendimento para calcular o fundo acumulado. Privado e sem cadastro.
- [Calculadora de CET](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/calculadora-cet/): Calcule o Custo Efetivo Total de empréstimos e financiamentos gratuitamente. Compare ofertas pelo custo real. Privado e sem cadastro.
- [Calculadora de Custo de Carro](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/calculadora-custo-carro/): Descubra quanto de carro você pode comprar com base na renda e despesas. Calcule o valor ideal de parcela e custo total. Privado e sem cadastro.
- [Calculadora de Financiamento](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/calculadora-financiamento/): Simule financiamentos gratuitamente. Calcule parcela mensal, total de juros e amortiza\u00e7\u00e3o com valor, taxa e prazo. Privado e sem cadastro.
- [Calculadora de IMC](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/calculadora-imc/): Calcule seu IMC gratuitamente com peso e altura. Veja sua classificação, faixa de peso ideal e dicas de saúde. Privado e sem cadastro.
- [Calculadora de Juros Compostos](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/calculadora-juros-compostos/): Calcule juros compostos gratuitamente. Informe capital, taxa, prazo e aportes mensais para ver o crescimento do investimento. Privado e sem cadastro.
- [Calculadora de Margem de Lucro](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/calculadora-margem-lucro/): Calcule margem bruta e líquida do seu negócio gratuitamente. Receita, custos e lucro em um só lugar. Privado e sem cadastro.
- [Gerador de Carta de Apresentação — Teamz Lab](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/gerador-carta-apresentacao/): Gere uma carta de apresentação profissional em segundos. Preencha seu nome, cargo, habilidades e conquista principal. Grátis, privado, sem cadastro.
- [Orçamento 50/30/20](https://tool.teamzlab.com/pt/orcamento-50-30-20/): Organize suas finanças com a regra 50/30/20 gratuitamente. Divida sua renda entre necessidades, desejos e investimentos. Privado e sem cadastro.
